programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ is surprised to learn that “The Land of Mother Goose” truly exists. Baby Bop catches Barney, BJ, and Riff wrapping a mysterious present in the caboose, she just can’t wait to see what it is.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Playing Games - No, No, No!
programme.desc: Baby Bop has trouble following the rules and taking turns while playing games. Barney and Riff help her learn how to follow the rules. In the end, Baby Bop and BJ have fun playing together, and Baby Bop learns that rules make games fun for everyone!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Bienvenido, Barney!
programme.desc: Baby Bop's friend Monty the butterfly passes through the park with a flock of friends on their way to Mexico. When Monty gets left behind by his insect friends and family, Barney takes everyone on a visit to Mexico.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: That Makes Me Mad!
programme.desc: Barney helps his young friends find good ways to express and deal with angry emotions.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Imagine That!
programme.desc: While Baby Bop and BJ are pretending to be pirates, Barney creates a magical island for their fantastic adventure. Together they discover ways to have fun while playing dress up, pretending, and being silly.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ and Baby Bop decide to get Halloween celebrations underway with a costume party. When Ramon loses his trick-or-treat candy, BJ shares his treats with Ramon.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Picture of Friendship
programme.desc: After a brief misunderstanding, BJ realizes he has many friends. He enjoys a day playing with Barney and the children.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: On Again, Off Again
programme.desc: Barney, Baby Bop and the kids learn all about "on" and "off" by playing games together.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Seeing - Beethoven's Hear!
programme.desc: An ordinary game of "hide and seek" takes a not-so-ordinary turn when Baby Bop claims that an elephant is hiding in the park! Barney and Riff are happy to play along, but BJ thinks that his sister may be "seeing things."

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The New Kid - The Princess And The Frog
programme.desc: When Riff meets a new friend in the park, BJ feels a little left out. BJ goes to great lengths to try to find a new friend for himself. Barney helps BJ see that we don't have to forget old friends when we make new ones.
programme.sub-title: The New Kid - The Princess And The Frog

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Ryan tries to be just like Barney but soon learns that he is special when he's being himself! Barney explains to Baby Bop that the word "no" can help you avoid making mistakes or getting hurt.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop has trouble following the rules and taking turns while playing games. BJ hurts his toe while pretending to be Captain Pickles.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Little Red Rock'n Hood - Differences
programme.desc: Baby Bop is having a hard time finding a story she hasn't heard before. Barney and the little dinos decide to tell her an old story with a new twist! They tell the story of "Little Red Riding Hood" in a whole new way...by singing it!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop wants Barney, BJ and the Park Kids to play with her instead of working in a garden. RIFF plays detective to track down the source of a mysterious sound in the Park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Perfectly Purple Day
programme.desc: When Sarah accidentally spills red paint into the blue paint, a mess turns into a perfectly purple day. The children paint pictures, make purple flowers and plan a purple party for their friend Colleen.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Easy as ABC
programme.desc: When Baby Bop uses the caboose mailbox to deliver a special invitation to her tea party, she discovers that no one can read her handwriting. Barney and his friends find creative ways to help her learn her ABCs!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Mother Goose - Fun With Reading
programme.desc: While playing in the caboose, BJ is surprised to learn that "The Land of Mother Goose" truly exists. Several Mother Goose characters have come to ask for help! Parts of their rhymes are missing! When Mother Goose arrives, she fixes the problem.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Bird of a Different Feather
programme.desc: Barney takes the kids to Hawaii on a quest for a bird of paradise. While there, they meet some friends, learn new Hawaiian words, make a Hawaiian lei and dance a hula! Eventually, Barney and his friends find a bird of paradise.
programme.sub-title: A Bird of a Different Feather

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ, Baby Bop and Riff can hardly wait for the petting zoo that is coming to the park. Riff feels terrible when he accidentally wrecks BJ’s beloved scooter.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The Blame Game - Airplanes
programme.desc: Marcos accidentally breaks an art show project that Melanie has made. Afraid that she will be angry, he doesn't say anything, but then feels guilty. Barney helps him see that honesty and taking responsibility for what we do is always best. together.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Pistachio - BJ Snack Attack
programme.desc: Barney is snacking on pistachios...and just can't seem to stop! His young friends try to help by hiding them from Barney. When that doesn't work, they tell him a story to help him stop eating pistachios.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ sings that he wants to be a rock and roll star. Baby Bop sings that she wants to be a country music star. BJ gets mistaken for the artist who painted a portrait of Barney.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Once Upon a Fairy Tale
programme.desc: Mario is trying to write his very own fairy tale. The children help by acting out some of their favorite fairy tales to give Mario some ideas.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Squares, Squares Everywhere
programme.desc: Nick's homework is to find as many squares as he can. It's great fun when Barney and the kids help!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: At Home in the Park
programme.desc: The children work together to make a bird house. They are happy to learn that the bird will have lots of company; many animals make their homes in the park too!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ learns that having a pet is a bigger responsibility than he expected when he takes care of a friend’s dog. When Baby Bop’s favorite teddy bear is torn, she wants to take him to the vet for help.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop is surprised by the first day of cold weather, Barney helps her see that winter is a wonderful time. On a hot summer day, Barney teaches BJ about all the activities you can do in the summer.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Big Little Day
programme.desc: Barney helps Baby Bop and the children discover big and little things in the world around them. And by the end of the day, the kids have learned that big or little, they're all wonderful just the way they are!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The Shrinking Blankey - Things I Can Do
programme.desc: Baby Bop's blankey seems to be getting smaller; she's convinced it's shrinking. But Barney shows her that, actually, she is growing. Baby Bop is not sure she likes this idea at first.
programme.sub-title: The Shrinking Blankey - Things I Can Do

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Venice, Anyone?
programme.desc: Emma can't play with her friends because she has to complete a school project about her family. Before you know it, Barney brings Emma on a trip to Venice to learn more about her great granddad.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Today is the big dance party in the park. Barney tells Baby Bop the story of “The Princess Without a Song to Sing.”

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Real Thing
programme.desc: Allen and Ton compete with a notorious deep-pocketed bidder in Oxnard, CA, and score a vintage Coca-Cola vending machine, a vintage desk and a rare 1971 GMC truck.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Driller Instinct
programme.desc: Ton & Allen encounter aggressive outdoorsmen in the Alaskan wilderness. The guys discover an 8-wheeled ATV that travels on both land & water and an air percussion hammer that can drill through solid rock!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Friends in Hawaii Places
programme.desc: Allen &Ton enlist an assistant, Carolyn, and Allen's Hawaiian buddy, Junior, to help them battle local buyers. The guys find a WWII-era motor scooter and a stash of antique Polynesian tattoo tools that get used on Ton!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Ruff Day
programme.desc: Ton and Allen head to an auction in Ton's hometown and end up battling with a big-mouthed buyer. They discover a pair of tranquilizer dart guns and also end up fighting with a K9!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Home on the Gun Range
programme.desc: Barely making it to an auction in Corona, CA, Allen and Ton buy an overstuffed unit and find an antique crossbow, a rare 10-gauge Winchester shotgun and a 1940s Kiss-o-Meter.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Bowling Pin Payday
programme.desc: Allen & Ton visit Ton's old stompin' ground and go head-to-head with a trash-talking auction buyer. They uncover a 19th century rifle with a matching cutlass bayonet and a mechanical bowling pinsetter from the early 1960's!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Mr. Haff Goes to Washington
programme.desc: Ton and Allen invade the Nation's capital, but meet strong resistance from local bidders. The guys uncover a Civil War era black powder revolver and a stash of South African gold coins!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Auction Hunters, Ink.
programme.desc: Autographed 1960s Bob Shaw Swing Gate tattoo machine; Terry Ives competition 22hp chainsaw; six foot chainsaw-carved cedar bear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Quadzilla Attacks!
programme.desc: Extreme Quadzilla ATV, the fastest 4 wheeler ever; a 1910s Remington Derringer and an 1880s Palm Squeezer pistol; revolutionary 1800s Western Electric telephone with a crank dial.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Big Score
programme.desc: At a climate-controlled storage facility in downtown L.A., Allen and Ton's locker wins score them an antique cash register and a German H&K pistol prized by collectors.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Great American Cashtime
programme.desc: Rare 1950s Master Pitch baseball machine; 1980s Jaws of Life tool used by rescuers to pry open cars.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Jersey Score
programme.desc: Ton & Allen attend a silent auction in NJ, but that doesn't stop the local buyers from letting them know they're not welcome! They uncover a skeet throwing machine from the 1960's & a vintage vehicle with some real horsepower!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ice, Ice, Baby
programme.desc: Ton and Allen have to get aggressive when they encounter a towering opponent with a mountain of cash. The guys uncover a vintage ice resurfacing machine and an Olympic biathlon rifle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Night of the Digging Dead
programme.desc: A custom-built shark cage; 1900s pathologist's dissection toolkit; 1940s embalming pump and one of the first electric bone saws.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hula Moola
programme.desc: Ton and Allen jet to the Hawaiian islands where they're joined by a feisty new female assistant! The team uncovers a pair of James Bond-style gadgets designed for high-speed underwater travel and a vintage sled.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Animal Instincts
programme.desc: The first pump action shotgun - a Winchester Model 1897; a hunter's collection of prize big game, full-body taxidermy.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Big Easy Money
programme.desc: Allen & Ton head to New Orleans in search of easy money, but instead encounter some bayou bidders with big-time bucks! They discover a pair of early 19th-century dueling pistols & a vintage airboat fitted with a turbine engine!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Shuffle
programme.desc: Ton and Allen teach a cocky new auction hunter a lesson. They spot a 1940's-era shuffleboard table and uncover an early hot rod made from the fuel tank of a WWII fighter plane!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Knuckle Dust
programme.desc: 1870s French Jarre Dolne Knuckle Duster revolver-knife-brass knuckle combo, a rare original George Rodrigue "Blue Dog" screenprint and a 1980 autographed Raging Bull movie poster.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Drumming Up Cash
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face some silent but deadly competition at an auction in nearby Glendale. They discover a Zildjian brand percussion cymbal from the 1940's and a pyrotechnics control board designed for large-scale fireworks displays!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gold 'n' Gloves
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes toe-to-toe with Ton's evil twin! They find a medieval catapult designed for storming castles and Ton uncovers a hidden collection of gold bars worth thousands of dollars!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hidden Hot Wheels
programme.desc: Ton and Allen challenge a big time auction buyer on his home turf. The guys uncover a 1969 Chevelle Malibu muscle car and a single-shot pistol designed to aid Allied resistance fighters during WWII.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fire in the Hole!
programme.desc: 1930s "blasting machine" dynamite detonator box; 1890s treasure chest with secret compartments. Ton smelts jewelry to forge bricks of silver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sidecar Surprise
programme.desc: An unassuming mom in an oversized sweater tries to pull the wool over Ton & Allen's eyes at a storage auction in Arlington, VA. The guys uncover a black powder cannon designed in the 15th century & a Russian military motorcycle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Reel Money
programme.desc: 1970's-era Fighting Chair used for big-game fishing; military MILES "laser tag" training system.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fake Punt Payoff
programme.desc: Ton and Allen contend with a large crowd of inexperienced auction-buyers at a huge storage container auction in Pasadena. They find a small fleet of Segway personal transporters and an enormous custom-made shotgun.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Dallas Mavericks
programme.desc: Military-grade Tomahawk cruise missile jet engine; century-old handcrafted wild west cowboy saddle; 1960s high roller's gold money.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Hot Commodity
programme.desc: Allen is late to the auction, leaving Ton to battle a feisty female auction buyer on his own! The guys find a fully functional flamethrower and a rare hand-carved bow and arrow set from South America!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Smoking Ton
programme.desc: WW2 Stuart M3 tank barrel and heavy duty tank treads; rare, collectors' 1890 silver inlayed humidor; high-end industrial meat slicer in the ultimate restaurant unit.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Money Makin' Monster Machines
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes on the attack & ends up on a collision course with a hardened veteran auction buyer. They uncover a collection of speedy off-road vehicles and some hardcore heavy metal from the turn-of the-century!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gangster Whiskey
programme.desc: Allen and Ton trek to an auction in Moreno Valley, CA, where two locker wins yield a vintage jukebox, a valuable baseball card and a Prohibition-era moonshine still.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Half Pipe Dreams
programme.desc: 1970s Z-Flex Jimmy Plumer Poolrider skateboard with artwork by Doug Smith; Kevlar bulletproof vest, ballistic facemask and a helmet used by S.W.A.T. teams; a pair of 1990s racing pocket bikes capable of going 80 mph.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Disco and Dice
programme.desc: 1978 Williams Disco pinball machine; 1898 dice popper gambling device; talking 1990s bar top breathalyzer; deadly fishing harpoon.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Everything's Bigger in Texas
programme.desc: Winchester 1886 rifle invented to kill buffalo; collection of 1950s electric Slot Cars.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gangs of New York
programme.desc: Ton and Allen duke it out with a local thrift store gang at a Brooklyn storage auction. The guys discover a classic arcade redemption game and a mid-century water cannon designed to fight towering infernos!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Chicago Grand Slam
programme.desc: 1984 Yamaha SS440 Snowmobile that introduced the revolutionary shock absorber suspension; rare autographed 1920s baseball glove; mint Hank Aaron signed baseball; authentic 1950s Robby the Robot collector toy.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Voodoo Moola
programme.desc: Allen & Ton hit a storage auction in Louisiana's Capitol City and quickly find themselves in trouble with the law! The guys uncover a pair of racing lawnmowers and then stumble on an antique barber chair from the early 1900s!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Got a Gun
programme.desc: In the affluent area of Mission Hills, CA, Allen and Ton pick up an estate unit that contains a minibike, a Depression-era slot machine and an 1871 Colt revolver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Dead Aim
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face-off against an auction buyer with shady bidding tactics and even more questionable fashion sense. The guys find a custom-built monowheel & a rifle designed to ward off grave robbers in the early 19th century!

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: Labour And Love
programme.desc: More tears, tiffs and true love in Teen Mom UK. Megan has a baby, Amber has a meltdown, and romance is in the air for Mia. Sassi celebrates her 1st Mother's Day and Chloe tackles her weight. (S2, ep5)

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: Lads Trip
programme.desc: Megan welcomes a new addition to the family... a horse! Chloe heads to the gym while Jordan heads to Amsterdam. There are fireworks for Amber and Ste, and Sassi plans a Christening. (S2, ep6)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Low Blows
programme.desc: Divorce mediation leads to arguments outside the courtroom for Kailyn and Javi. Chelsea officially reveals her baby's gender. Leah finds out that Jeremy is engaged.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jenelle reaches boiling point with Barbara. Chelsea and Cole add a temporary member to their family. Kailyn and Javi face off. Leah is forced to make a tough decision about beauty school. (S7, ep23)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Cherries and Flowers
programme.desc: Chelsea and Cole tie the knot. Kailyn and Javi try to make amends. Leah prepares for a new chapter in her life. Kaiser starts preschool, and Nathan shares shocking news.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: The girls travel to LA for the Teen Mom 2 reunion. Jenelle and Barbara's onstage feud leads to a backstage blowout, and after reconciling with Javi, Kailyn is blindsided by allegations. (S7, ep25)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: A fun look back at the biggest, most dramatic moments from past reunions.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Season 7 Unseen Moments
programme.desc: Chelsea, Kailyn, Leah and Jenelle join Nessa to react to a collection of hilarious and touching never-before-seen clips from the series.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Chelsea, Kailyn, Leah and Jenelle join Nessa to react to a collection of hilarious and touching never-before-seen clips from Teen Mom 2.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Dr Drew hosts the cast of Teen Mom 2 in front of a live studio audience and learns how Leah is coparenting with both Corey and Jeremy. Jenelle and Nathan face off over Kaiser.
programme.sub-title: Season 7B Finale Special - Check Up with Dr. Drew Part 1

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Season 7A - Reunion 2
programme.desc: In part two, Adam threatens to leave the show as Chelsea tries to confront him over spending time with Aubree. Kailyn and Javi open up about their marital issues during an emotional discussion.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: And Then There Were Five
programme.desc: TM2's newest mum, Briana, grapples with an unplanned pregnancy. A sudden move tests Jenelle and David's relationship. Meanwhile, Chelsea prepares for her son's arrival.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Down That Route
programme.desc: Briana is faced with a heart-wrenching decision, Kailyn's friend reveals some very personal information, and Jenelle and Nathan confront each other in court.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Low Key
programme.desc: Kailyn finally discusses the big news she's been hiding, while Briana starts exploring adoption, and Aubree has some trouble adjusting to her baby brother.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Surprise!
programme.desc: Jeremy shocks Leah with some unexpected news. Javi gets intel on Kailyn's pregnancy. David plans another big surprise for Jenelle. Aubree's school has a father/daughter dance.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Lips Don't Lie
programme.desc: Leah investigates a business opportunity. Kailyn faces Javi in court and Chelsea hears some disturbing news. Jace meets his baby sister, and Jenelle announces her engagement.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Unfinished Sentences
programme.desc: Leah faces a difficult decision about college. Jenelle and David hit the rocks while setting up their new home. Chelsea worries about Aubree at Adam's parents'. Kailyn struggles at school.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Motherducker
programme.desc: Kailyn is furious when her pregnancy is leaked. Briana's mum confronts Luis about the baby. Ali makes a heartbreaking confession, and Jace spends his first weekend at Jenelle's new house.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: On the Hunt
programme.desc: After Barb refuses to let Jace come over, Jenelle tracks her down. Briana gives Luis an ultimatum, and Kailyn and Javi are forced to face each other at Lincoln's soccer practice.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jenelle has a tumultuous Mother's Day when she's barred from seeing Jace. Briana is under pressure while preparing for her baby shower. Kailyn is shocked when Javi files for child support. (S8, ep9)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Welcome to a Puerto Rican Baby Shower
programme.desc: Briana's baby shower goes downhill when Luis shows up. Jenelle finally gets her day in court. Kailyn struggles with juggling school and family, and Chelsea takes Aubree out for a girls day.
programme.sub-title: Welcome to a Puerto Rican Baby Shower

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Swiping and Griping
programme.desc: Jenelle and Barb reach an agreement for custody of Jace. Briana is surprised by unexpected news from Luis. Leah reluctantly re-enters the dating world. Aubree visits Adam for Father's Day.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Leah
programme.desc: West Virginia cheerleader Leah is having twins with a boy she was dating for one month. If that wasn't hard enough, she develops health issues that put the babies' lives at risk.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Lizzie
programme.desc: Lizzie's pregnancy forces her to drop out of high school and the marching band. She looks to her boyfriend Skylar for support... until she discovers he hasn't always been faithful.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Kailyn
programme.desc: Kailyn's mum moved in with her new boyfriend, forcing Kailyn to live with her young boyfriend's family while she attempts to go to college.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Brooke
programme.desc: After a shotgun wedding, Brooke and Cody are forced to sacrifice car racing for parenthood. Now they're trying to balance high school life and moving in to their own place.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Felicia
programme.desc: The youngest of five, Felicia's the only one in her family with a shot at graduating. But when it gets tough with her boyfriend and she leaves home, will she be forced to drop out?

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Emily
programme.desc: Emily, an all-American girl, has to leave her majorette baton and boyfriend behind, as she moves an hour away and faces the pressure of starting over in a new school and town.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Markai
programme.desc: Pregnant Markai and her boyfriend James may be kicked out of her house when her mum has had enough. So will Markai finish school and can their relationship survive James's infidelity?

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Aubrey
programme.desc: Aubrey and Brandon must find a home and start over in a new town, all while she tries to get her GED. They get married, but will their fresh start cause them to resent one another? (S2, ep16)

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Christinna
programme.desc: Christinna and Isiah have had to change their college plans as they prepare for their baby. His family is furious when he gives up his scholarship. Can they make it on their own?

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Kayla
programme.desc: Kayla is a southern belle. Now that she's pregnant, she has to start making her own tough decisions about marriage and her ability to make it without the help of her parents.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Megan
programme.desc: While her dad's in Afghanistan, Megan gets pregnant. But with little money and a video game playing boyfriend not necessarily in for the long haul, she'll have to grow up fast.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Ashley
programme.desc: Ashley is a pregnant high school senior from Texas with no baby daddy weighing in, and a family encouraging her to choose adoption. But when the time comes, what will she decide?

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Unseen Moments 2
programme.desc: Unseen moments from the episodes Brooke, Felicia, Emily, Markai, Aubrey, Christinna, Kayla, Megan, and Ashley.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Reunion
programme.desc: Dr. Drew hosts an emotional finale as the teen mothers from the latest series share a stage, coming together with their boyfriends & parents to talk about the issues they face.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Jordan
programme.desc: Jordan and her sister were models and best friends until Jordan's pregnancy put all that on hold. Now her boyfriend and her sister are competing to be her number one.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Jennifer
programme.desc: After abandoning sports and losing her friends, Jennifer has to battle with her over-protective parents to accept her boyfriend before she gives birth to twin boys.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Jamie
programme.desc: Raised by a single mum, Jamie is a straight A student with big plans for the future. But after getting pregnant she struggles to mould her immature boyfriend into the father she never had.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Danielle
programme.desc: After following her mum's footsteps by becoming a teen mum, Danielle strives to prove she can do things differently. But she soon learns she needs help managing school, a job and a baby.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Cleondra
programme.desc: Regarded as the most likely to succeed in her family, Cleondra shocks everyone by getting pregnant so young. Now she faces the tough decision to leave home and move in with her boyfriend.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Kayla
programme.desc: Kayla's anorexia comes back full-force when she is pregnant. While struggling to put looks aside, Kayla realizes that the person she has always relied on, her mother, refuses to support her.

programme.title: CSI: NY: The Box
programme.desc: The remains of a pregnant 17-year-old are found in the trunk of a crashed car, but the baby is missing. During the investigation, Danny finds out some shocking news about Lindsay.

programme.title: CSI: NY: The Triangle
programme.desc: The CSIs are forced to investigate two crimes at once with a mysterious energy field near The Empire State Building at the center of both.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Forbidden Fruit
programme.desc: The CSIs appear to have an open and shut case after a murder suspect is impaled during a police pursuit, but it turns out to only be beginning.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Help
programme.desc: Young brides-to-be fight over a killer dress at the biggest wedding gown sale of the year and one of the shoppers winds up dead.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Rush to Judgement
programme.desc: The CSIs must piece together a human jigsaw puzzle when a beloved wrestling coach's severed body parts are found buried throughout the city.

programme.title: CSI: NY: She’s Not There
programme.desc: A Russian tourist is found stabbed to death and the CSIs come face to face with the frightening realities of human trafficking.

programme.title: CSI: NY: The Party's Over
programme.desc: When the Mayor's dead body falls from the ceiling at a charity fundraiser, Stella and her date find themselves in the middle of the crime scene.

programme.title: CSI: NY: No Good Deed
programme.desc: When a buzzard flying over Manhattan drops a human eyeball from its claw, the race is on to find the body it belongs to.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Happily Never After
programme.desc: A notorious hotel owner known for her meanness is found dead under an ice sculpture, and the clues to the death of a second woman who fell to her death onto a school bus can be found in the book "Peter Pan."

programme.title: CSI: New York: Personal Foul
programme.desc: As the search for the "Cabbie Killer" continues, riding a cab gets very deadly. The team must figure out how to keep New York City safe.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Veritas
programme.desc: Immediately following the previous season finale, the team is investigating the death of a woman named Lauren Salinas who is linked to the bank robbery. She turns out to be a friend of Flack's sister Samantha.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Page Turner
programme.desc: When two people turn up dead with radiation poisoning, it sparks an urgent investigation before it turns into a deadly outbreak in New York City when it's tracked down to a book at the NYC Library.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Turbulence
programme.desc: When an Air Marshal turns up dead on a flight on which Mac is a passenger, the victim it turns out, isn't a Marshal at all. The real Marshal was killed earlier and his ID stolen.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Sex, Lies, and Silicone
programme.desc: When a prominent journalist named Ann Steele turns up dead at a street party, the investigation leads the team to a life-size silicone doll company.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Dead Inside
programme.desc: A man is found dead in a basement, but the house where the death occurred is found miles away on a barge in the East River. Meanwhile, Flack discovers that his sister lost her job and has a drinking problem.

programme.title: CSI: New York: My Name Is Mac Taylor
programme.desc: When two men who share the same name as detective Mac Taylor are killed, detective Taylor rounds up all the other Mac Taylors in New York and tries to figure out who will be the next victim.

programme.title: CSI: New York: The Triangle
programme.desc: CSI investigates the death of a armored truck security guard, which appears to be related to a disturbance at a so-called "Bermuda Triangle" of electric activity near the Empire State Building.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Rush To Judgment
programme.desc: While investigating the death and dismemberment of a high school wrestling coach, detective Flack gets in trouble when a suspect dies in his custody.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Green Piece
programme.desc: An environmental terrorist group bombs the home of an electronics recycler, and his daughter is killed--but the daughter is part of the terrorist group. Meanwhile, Danny considers proposing to Lindsay again.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Communication Breakdown
programme.desc: CSI tries to figure who is responsible for the death of the chief of a Native American tribe who were some of the original inhabitants of Manhattan.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Prey
programme.desc: A murder victim turns out to be a violent stalker, and the killer may be one of his stalking victims who learned to cover her tracks by attending one of Bonasera's college seminars.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Nailed
programme.desc: Ryan Wolfe is attacked and seriously injured while investigating the murder of a distraught soon-to-be ex-wife, and there is no shortage of suspects.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Urban Hellraisers
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team must rely on a video game for their next clue as to where a group of young gunmen will strike next.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Shattered
programme.desc: The CSI team is hard-pressed to find the killer of an infamous drug lord, and a member of the team is investigated for drugs by Internal Affairs.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Payback
programme.desc: A rapist is brutally murdered after his identity is exposed. Horatio and the CSI team are called in to investigate the murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: The Score
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team investigate a group of male “pickup artists” out to score when one of them unexpectedly turns up dead.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Silencer (aka Dance Of Death)
programme.desc: Miami’s Latin Festival shifts from Samba to somber when a crowded dance floor becomes the scene of a gang member. Horatio and the team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Fade Out
programme.desc: A bizarre murder of a South Beach club owner turns out to be a script where art is imitating life. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Three-Way
programme.desc: Three suburban housewives on a girls' weekend in Miami are the prime suspects when the hotel's handsome pool boy is found murdered.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Under Suspicion
programme.desc: The CSI team must race against time when all evidence in a murder case points to Horatio.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Felony Flight
programme.desc: A convicted serial killer escapes after sabotaging an airplane that was flying him from New York to Miami, where he allegedly buried a body.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Nailed
programme.desc: The CSI team are called out to investigate the murder of a young woman who was about to sign her divorce papers.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Urban Hellraisers
programme.desc: Eric finds himself in the middle of a robbery while at the bank. The team soon learns that the bank robbery is part of a video game called "Urban Hellraisers" being played out in real life.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Shattered
programme.desc: A drug lord is gunned in his Coconut Grove mansion and a suspect arrested at the scene claims he sells marijuana to Delko. Rick Stetler, from Internal Affairs, investigates and the case quickly becomes personal when Horatio gets involved.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: The Score
programme.desc: The CSI team investigate the brutal murder of a man who was learning how to pick up women. Meanwhile, Horatio tries to help out Marisol, Delko's sister, who was arrested on drug charges.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Silencer
programme.desc: The Mala Noche strike again and it's up to the CSI team to bring them down once and for all. Major secrets are revealed about the characters and their personal lives.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Fade Out
programme.desc: When evidence shows that a series of murders is linked to organized crime, Horatio and the team are instead lead to a pair of film students who possess a screenplay containing the details of the crimes.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Skeletons
programme.desc: When Horatio's nemesis, Walter Resden, targets someone from their past, Horatio tries to stop him. Delko's relationship with Natalia is tested when she thinks she may be pregnant.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Collision
programme.desc: A horrible car accident that claims the life of a woman turns out to be a murder case. During the investigation Natalia confesses a secret history of marital abuse in order to help the case to be solved.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Driven
programme.desc: After a group of wealthy young women's cars are stolen from a luxury day spa, evidence leads the CSI's to believe that this is a part of a much larger car chopping scam and each of these women are being targeted for a home robbery.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Free Fall
programme.desc: The CSI team must try to find out who is trying to kill a young couple who are released from prison. The couple, who become a Bonnie and Clyde type “media darlings” soon discover that not everyone regards them as such.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: A Winter’s Grave
programme.desc: During an icy Wisconsin winter, a single mom vanishes. Police learn she was recently stalked by two men at a bar, but the danger doesn’t stop there.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Blood Red Snow
programme.desc: After a fun night out, Morna Brennen walks into an icy parking lot and disappears. When body parts begin showing up in the area, police must decipher cryptic clues to understand what happened.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Rev. Jim Jones: Unholy Massacre (Part 1)
programme.desc: More than 900 Americans died in the jungle in Guyana in November 1978. The man responsible, Jim Jones, has gone down in history as a madman who drove his followers to suicide.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Rev. Jim Jones: Unholy Massacre (Part 2)
programme.desc: More than 900 Americans died in the jungle in Guyana in November 1978. The man responsible, Jim Jones, has gone down in history as a madman who drove his followers to suicide.

programme.title: Very Scary People: NorCal Rapist: Phantom Predator (Part 1)
programme.desc: The NorCal Rapist terrorized women in Northern California over three decades. This episode details the horror of the attacks, and the new forensic science that led to the suspect’s capture.

programme.title: Very Scary People: NorCal Rapist: Phantom Predator (Part 2)
programme.desc: The NorCal Rapist terrorized women in Northern California over three decades. This episode details the horror of the attacks, and the new forensic science that led to the suspect’s capture.

programme.title: Sins & Secrets
programme.desc: In 2008, Jim Cannon, a prominent attorney and father of three, is found dead in his Nashville mansion. Jim was well known for his promiscuity with other women and even men.

programme.title: Sins & Secrets: St. Michaels
programme.desc: On Valentine’s Day 1998, a stunned woman approached the front desk of a St Michaels, Maryland resort to report a fire in her hotel room where a charred body was pulled from the smoke.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Line Goes Dead
programme.desc: When the severed head of a wife and mother is found, Lt. Joe Kenda uses forensics and interrogation to find both her body and her killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Metal on Metal
programme.desc: A athlete is gunned down just weeks before starting college, leaving family heartbroken and detectives stumped. The man seems an unlikely target, until Lt. Joe Kenda pries into his personal life.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Death Grip
programme.desc: When a speeding truck crashes into a residential building, officers find the lifeless body of Michael Faast behind the wheel. But he didn’t die in the wreck – he was shot point-blank in the temple.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Knock Knock
programme.desc: A gathering of friends turns deadly when two gunmen shoot William Davis in the head. Kenda and his team dig into his past and start to suspect someone in William’s circle is lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Murder Bites
programme.desc: A young woman is found naked and strangled in a park not 200 yards from her home. It isn’t until Lt. Joe Kenda rethinks the entire case that he realizes someone has been lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Time Bomb
programme.desc: In 1978, Lt. Joe Kenda is new to the CSPD, and gets more than he bargains for when a local bank is the target of a massive explosion.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Snitch
programme.desc: When officers respond to a shooting , they discover the body of a young man they know all to well -- police informant Jimmie Stevenson. it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda to determine who pulled the trigger.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: John 3:16
programme.desc: A man rushes his friend to the hospital with serious gunshot wounds, reporting they were robbed by strangers. When the facts don’t add up, Lt. Joe Kenda and his team go on the hunt.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Poker Face
programme.desc: A group of friends discover the corpse of entrepreneur Jamie Foster hidden under a blanket. Kenda e discovers that Foster’s business put him in close quarters with a host of unsavory characters.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: After School Special
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes when a beloved teacher is poisoned in her classroom. As doctors fight to save Barbara Lewis’ life, Lt. Joe Kenda and his team delve into her personal affairs.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Blood Sisters
programme.desc: The bullet-ridden bodies of two sisters are found in a suburban house that’s littered with mysterious clues. Joe Kenda learns that the two unassuming young mothers shared an explosive secret.

programme.title: The Millers: Mother's Day
programme.desc: Carol has the worst Mother's Day ever when Nathan forgets to get her a present.

programme.title: The Millers: Movin' Out (Carol's Song)
programme.desc: Carol begins her search for a new apartment, causing Nathan and Debbie to race each other to find her a place that is the farthest away from each of them.

programme.title: The Millers: CON-Troversy
programme.desc: Nathan is assigned to cover a Sci-Fi Fest for his workplace and runs into a famous book author who has hated him since grade school.

programme.title: The Millers: Reunited and It Feels So Bad
programme.desc: Tom and Carol decide to formally end their marriage but are surprised when they both hesitate to finalize the divorce, sending Nathan and Debbie into a panic at the thought of their parents reconciling.
programme.sub-title: Reunited and It Feels So Bad

programme.title: The Millers: Give Metta World Peace a Chance
programme.desc: Nathan lands the biggest interview of his career with professional basketball player Metta World Peace, but when karma catches up with him, he risks ruining his professional reputation.
programme.sub-title: Give Metta World Peace a Chance

programme.title: The Millers: Diggin' Up Bones
programme.desc: In an attempt to get Carol to be more daring, Kip encourages her to confront her old Central Elementary School work nemesis, Miss Pam (Molly Shannon), at the teacher's retirement party.

programme.title: The Millers: You Are the Wind Beneath My Wings, Man
programme.desc: When Ray points out that Nathan has a history of being the worst wingman ever, Nathan embarks on a mission to be a better friend by becoming less self-involved.
programme.sub-title: You Are the Wind Beneath My Wings, Man

programme.title: The Millers: When The Pope Comes Marching In
programme.desc: When the Pope is scheduled to come to town, Nathan's planned week-long series of reports hits a snag when Ray gets a job offer to become the cameraman for a rival field reporter.
programme.sub-title: When The Pope Comes Marching In

programme.title: The Millers: Papa Was a Rolling Bone
programme.desc: The Millers decide to spend Thanksgiving apart for the first time ever, but they rethink the new family tradition when all their individual Turkey Day plans hit unexpected snags.

programme.title: The Millers: Louise Louise
programme.desc: When The Millers get a visit from their elderly Aunt Louise (Cloris Leachman), they rally to help her figure out what her legacy will be when she worries that she hasn't left her mark on the world yet.

programme.title: The Millers: Highway to the Manger Zone
programme.desc: When staging their church's annual living nativity scene does not go as planned, Kip urges the Millers to stage their own rival show.

programme.title: The Millers: Hero
programme.desc: When Nathan decides he should have a better relationship with his niece Mikayla, he agrees to use his celebrity status to help Debbie and Adam get her into a popular school.

programme.title: The Millers: Pilot
programme.desc: Nathan and his sister, Debbie, are upset when their parents announce they're divorcing after 43 years of marriage.

programme.title: The Millers: Stuff
programme.desc: Nathan hatches a plan to get his parents back together by showing them all of their sentimental family possessions in the hopes it will make them remember the good times they've had.

programme.title: The Millers: The Phone Upgrade
programme.desc: Nathan and Debbie trade parents when they each think the other sibling has it easier.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: When Holly (Kristen Johnston) has to face her cheating ex fiancé for the first time since they broke up, she enlists the guys' help to prove to him he lost the best thing he ever had.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil (Donald Faison) is nervous when Holly (Kristen Johnston) starts dating his top client – basketball player Kevin Tyler (Amar'e Stoudemire). Haskell (Wayne Knight) lures Stuart (David Alan Basche) into the world of sports betting.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: The gang's relationships are thrown out of whack when Holly discovers there's way more to Stuart than meets the eye.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: When the guys can't resolve their differences, Holly sends the three of them to couples' therapy, where they discover that Holly is the problem.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly takes Haskell on a practice date, and finds herself blown away by Haskell's hidden talents. Stuart embarrasses Phil when he tries way too hard to fit in with Phil's friends.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly tries to get to the bottom of a big secret between Eden and her boss. Stuart is about to be reunited with his beloved dog – until Phil loses him.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil’s quest to land a new client puts the boys in a strip club, and Stuart in the hospital. Holly’s new “magic bra” works wonders.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly’s office crush Paul returns to work, and she is determined to find out how he feels about her once and for all.Stuart, sick of doing all the cleaning himself hires a maid, who quickly turns Haskell’s life upside down.
programme.sub-title: How Holly Got Her Groove Back

programme.title: The Exes: The Party
programme.desc: After giving Holly’s new boyfriend Paul a hard time, the guys make amends and Paul invites them to the party of a lifetime. But on the way, Stuart discovers that Paul’s ex-wife might still be in the picture.

programme.title: The Exes: Sister Act
programme.desc: Desperate to impress her perfect sister Jill, Holly invents an alternative lifestyle for herself that quickly spirals out of control. Meanwhile, the guys are riding high on a "special" dish cooked up by Stuart.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil's client, tennis star Chuck Feeney, stays with the guys to hide from the paparazzi. But Chuck the ladies' man turns out to be more of a man's man. Haskell and Holly compete over who can take better care of pregnant Eden.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: When the guys accidentally break Holly's vibrator, they scramble to fix it before she finds out so it doesn't ruin their friendship.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly's boyfriend Paul orders the guys to not hang out with her when he's around. When Holly discovers what Paul did, she's forced to choose between poker night and date night.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell's ex-wife Margo gets amnesia after an accident and stays with Haskell to recover, only she thinks they're still married. Phil and Stuart spend the night in Holly's place and get to know her intimate sleeping behavior.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: When Holly despairs about dating again, the guys secretly create an online dating profile for her and discover what dating is like from a woman's perspective.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell's ex-wife Margo gets amnesia after an accident and stays with Haskell to recover, only she thinks they're still married. Phil and Stuart spend the night in Holly's place and get to know her intimate sleeping behavior.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: When Phil and Holly make a pact to ask their bosses for raises, Phil gets fired. Holly tries to help Phil get his job back. Stuart's integrity is tested when he dates a British woman with repulsive teeth.
programme.sub-title: Take This Job and Shove It

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: When Holly and Eden date two charming French men who shower them with gifts and glamorous living, they wonder if their dream dates are too good to be true. Phil and Haskell train Stuart on how to confront a bully at the bar.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil opens his own agency and enlists Eden as his temporary assistant to help sign his first client. Meanwhile, Holly hires Haskell as her temporary assistant. Stuart pursues the Yelper who smeared his practice's perfect rating.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly dates a much younger man and Eden questions his motives. Phil and Eden secretly become friends with benefits. Stuart convinces Haskell to pursue a woman he's admired from afar and ends up accidentally stealing her cat.
programme.sub-title: The Hand That Rocks the Cradle

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Unger The Influence
programme.desc: With the help of Murph, Oscar decides to throw a big party when Felix finally agrees to spend the weekend away. Also, Felix and Emily have their first sleepover.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: From Here to Maturity
programme.desc: Oscar faces a personal dilemma when he dates a young nanny, Allyson (Brianne Howey) who works for his neighbor, Charlotte (Teri Hatcher).

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Madison & Son
programme.desc: Oscar's dream comes true when he is asked to throw out the first pitch at a New York Mets game.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Oscar's Overture
programme.desc: Oscar attempts to impress Charlotte (Teri Hatcher) by purchasing a table for a fundraiser to benefit The New York Philharmonic.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: An Oscar Named Desire
programme.desc: Oscar and Charlotte hit a speed bump when they hesitate to take their relationship to the next level.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 99
programme.desc: It is no laughing matter for Judge Rhonda when a comedian won't pay her cousin back for a $5,000 loan after a smash and grab car thief took her cash and gun.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 75
programme.desc: A designer handbag trampled at a party drags two close cousins into court where Judge Rhonda must figure out if the purse is real or a fake.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 51
programme.desc: Sisters appear before Judge Rhonda with an allegation of credit card theft and a polygraph test helps the Judge uncover the truth.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 21
programme.desc: Cousins who live together can't agree over groceries and toilet tissue, Judge Rhonda has to unwrap this mess.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 128
programme.desc: Brothers from a big musical family slam into a sour note over a broken car, broken tools, and ask Judge Rhonda to fix practically everything but the kitchen sink in the house they share.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: Their mothers were sisters who didn't speak to each other, and now these cousins are not speaking over money one claims the other spent on paying men to sleep with her; Judge Rhonda is on the case.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 79
programme.desc: Growing up in foster care, she survived tragedy and tried to take care of her baby brother; now she needs Judge Rhonda's help to make him take his future seriously and pay her back.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: A two-month courtship led to an eight-month marriage which brought two old friends into Judge Rhonda's court fighting about stimulus money and a child custody lawyer.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: A couple who share seven children and a thriving protein shake business come infront of Judge Rhonda to solve the mystery of a broken Playstation.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 104
programme.desc: A celebrity wardrobe stylist says his "influencer" cousin failed to pay for a photoshoot he pulled together and Judge Rhonda must decide who has been taken to the cleaners.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 55
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda confronts a family in crisis with a mother trying to protect her daughter from the man she lives with; violence and heartbreak are consuming this family.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 103
programme.desc: They met when she was 16, now thirteen years and three children later, their marriage is on the rocks because he parties and pursues his dreams, so she presents Judge Rhonda with the support contract she wants enforced

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 97
programme.desc: Sisters with a terrific relationship are torn apart by a two-year old being a toddler, and Judge Rhonda calls a foul on their bickering.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 37
programme.desc: Two comedians with the same last name find out they are halfbrothers when they happen to work together, but a rude joke about one of their mothers brings them into Judge Rhonda's courtroom.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 137
programme.desc: Sisters who grew up in separate households became "petty partners" as adults are in Judge Rhonda's courtroom squabbling over a girl trip to Puerto Rico that went horribly wrong.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 76
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda faces the case of a man who thinks the rent and utilities he provided for his pregnant girlfriend because she could not work as an exotic dancer was a loan she should pay back.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 53
programme.desc: Her nephew, the make-up artist who specializes in gore, left her car a "bloody" mess after he hit a tree on the way to work and she wants Judge Rhonda to make him clean up the damage.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 29
programme.desc: An Exotic Dancer and her cousin the photographer sashay into Judge Rhonda's court at odds over who should pay for the pictures

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 150
programme.desc: Family squabbles can become destructive, especially when money is involved.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 57
programme.desc: A comedian claims his cousin the canibus festival promoter didn't pay for his performance; Judge Rhonda weeds through the facts for her verdict.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 41
programme.desc: When a Carpenter sees on social media that his cousin has been building her best life instead of paying him back he constructs a case for Judge Rhonda.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 133
programme.desc: A Fairy Tale romance goes horribly wrong when a former lover enters the picture and Judge Rhonda must solve the mystery of a birthstone engagement ring that is lost forever.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 4
programme.desc: In Judge Rhonda's Court cousins squabble over an expensive laptop that one claims fell out of the back of a rental SUV.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 28
programme.desc: Mother and Daughter face off in Judge Rhonda's courtroom over a secret breast augmentation surgery.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 64
programme.desc: When an older sister became the legal "mother" for her two young sisters, she and her husband paid all of their bills; now that one is a grown exotic dancer money makes them face Judge Rhonda.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 80
programme.desc: An identical twin and her mother accuse a twin sister of burning down her own home for the insurance money in Judge Rhonda's Courtroom.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 3
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda unravels a Rap Artist's mess between a new manager and her cousin, the old manager.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 46
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda solves a carpet caper when a cat named Maserati runs rampant over a mother and daughter's relationship.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: A flooded fancy bathtub ruined the brand new hardwood floors an ex son in-law installed to make his ex-wife's Mom comfortable and that damage splashed this family drama all over Judge Rhonda's courtroom.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 65
programme.desc: When an older sister became the legal "mother" for her two young sisters, she and her husband paid all of their bills; now that one is a grown exotic dancer, money makes them face Judge Rhonda.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 116
programme.desc: In Judge Rhonda's courtroom, a dispute over stimulus money reveals the family secret that is tearing three generations apart.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 88
programme.desc: Family is family, but when the money and the honies draw this niece to St. Louis, her aunt takes a trip to Judge Rhonda to solve this construction nightmare.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: What happened in Vegas ended up in Judge Rhonda's courtroom when two cousins who grew up like brothers fight over car damage and long simmering jealousy.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 114
programme.desc: When a mother drags her only child, a hoarder, into court and he accuses her of stealing items from him Judge Rhonda orders a polygraph test to settle this score, once and for all.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 85
programme.desc: Parents of a bratty boomerangdaughter reach the end of their rope and turn to Judge Rhonda for guidance when their young one asks for cash to buy weed.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 141
programme.desc: A Valentine's Day date gone horribly wrong forces the cool uncle who lost a possession he loved almost as much as his wife and child to drag his nephew in front of Judge Rhonda.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 110
programme.desc: Sisters dance apart in Judge Rhonda's courtroom when the one who owns the dance & fitness studio stops paying the other.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: When his legally blind uncle needed some help around the house this nephew stepped in and the job with the "fun uncle" went so badly that they ended up in front of Judge Rhonda.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 144
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda faces an angry Mom who claims her daughter spent her $5,000 gift for college rent on tattoos.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: First cousins who were more like sisters hit the rocks over a cruise that one paid for after the other's car exploded in flames; Judge Rhonda wades through this inferno to try to land these two on the beach.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 11
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda sorts out the dispute between a mother who said go to College or pay the bills and her son who tried to choose a third option.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 22
programme.desc: A round trip ticket from Japan to attend a family funeral flys two cousins into Judge Rhonda's Courtroom

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: What goes up must come down is an investment strategy Judge Rhonda has to explain to a neice who's favorite Uncle has lost a lot of her money on Wall Street.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 47
programme.desc: Comedian Kung Fu Panda claims his sister paid no rent and tried to poison him with her cooking, Judge Rhonda digs into the hot meal vs. free rent controversy.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Chaos Theory
programme.desc: The entire CSI team investigates a disappearance at a local university.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Overload
programme.desc: Grissom investigates a possible suicide at a high-profile construction site.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Bully For You
programme.desc: When the class clown at the local high school is found murdered, the CSI team is called to investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Scuba Doobie-Doo
programme.desc: Grissom, Sara and Warrick are called in to investigate an abandoned, blood-splattered apartment and Nick and Catherine must examine a dead scuba diver lodged in a tree.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Altar Boys
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate a murder suspect who is caught red-handed, burying the victims, while Catherine and Warrick take on the case of a woman found dead in a hotel spa.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Caged
programme.desc: Grissom and Nick investigate the death of a book restorer, while Catherine and Sara are called to the scene of a fatal train crash.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Slaves Of Las Vegas
programme.desc: Grissom and Catherine investigate the apparent violent death of a woman found in a sandbox. Their investigation leads them to the underground world of s and m clubs.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Crate ‘n Burial
programme.desc: The search is on for a abducted woman while a hit and run death of a little girl is investigated.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Pledging Mr. Johnson
programme.desc: A severed leg is found in a lake while a fraternity pledge goes badly.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Friends & Lovers
programme.desc: A young man is found naked and dead in the desert.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Who Are You?
programme.desc: Department protocol is violated when Catherine investigates her ex-husband's rape accusation.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Anonymous
programme.desc: A man is found dead in his bathtub with a tape recording saying he has committed suicide. Grisson, Catherine and Sara investigate the case that becomes more complicated when Grisson's fingerprint is found at the scene crime.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Unfriendly Skies
programme.desc: The team investigates the death of a passenger aboard a commercial airliner. They soon realize that the forensic evidence and passenger statements don't quite add up.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Sex, Lies And Larvae
programme.desc: Sara and Grissom investigate the death of a woman, Kaye Shelton, found wrapped in a blanket in the mountains. With no way to confirm the time of death, Grissom relies on the insects found on her body to establish a timeline.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: I-15 Murders
programme.desc: While investigating the disappearance of Margaret Shorey at a supermarket, Grissom and Catherine stumble upon a serial killer who claims to have killed five women in supermarkets located along the I-15.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Fahrenheit 932
programme.desc: Grissom receives a video tape from an inmate called Frank Damon who is on trial for the arson which resulted in his wife and son's death. On the tape, Damon claims that he is innocent and asks Grissom to help him.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Boom
programme.desc: A bomb in a brief case goes off in the lobby of an office building. The team piece together all the parts of this bomb to look for the maker's signature.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: To Halve And To Hold
programme.desc: A human bone is found in the desert by a man and his son playing fetch with their dog. Grissom and Catherine assemble a team to comb the area for more bones. Back at the lab, they piece together the dismembered body.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Table Stakes
programme.desc: The team arrives at a charity fundraiser being held at the house of Portia Richmond, an ex-show girl who became very successful, where a body is found floating in the swimming pool.

programme.title: The Real Prime Suspect
programme.desc: Former DCI Jackie Malton, accesses 10 case files, revisiting the investigations with the police, detectives and other professionals who experienced them first hand.

programme.title: The Real Prime Suspect
programme.desc: Former DCI Jackie Malton re-investigates the murder of 20-year-old Suzanne Greenhill, a deaf woman living in a community cut off from the world.
programme.sub-title: The Killing of a Deaf Girl

programme.title: Real Detective: North of the Border
programme.desc: After being promoted to the Homicide Unit, a detective is assigned to a case about a missing woman in Pickering.

programme.title: Real Detective: North of the Border
programme.desc: Mike Eastham is taken across the country and back again in attempts to catch a gunman responsible for one of the largest mass murders in Canadian history.

programme.title: Real Detective: North of the Border
programme.desc: An elderly woman is found brutally murdered in her upper-middle-class home, an apparent victim of a robbery gone wrong. As Lethbridge Police Detective Ryan Stef investigates, he uncovers a web of lies that implicates a shocking suspect.

programme.title: Real Detective: North of the Border
programme.desc: A young couple are bludgeoned to death in their Hamilton, Ontario, home in front of the woman's three-year-old son. The detective attempts to build a rapport with the child in order to solve the case.

programme.title: A Life in Crime: Jackie Malton
programme.desc: Retired DCI Jackie Malton tells the story of her rise to become one of the most respected police detectives of her generation and the inspiration for the hit TV drama 'Prime Suspect'.

programme.title: A Life in Crime: Donal MacIntyre
programme.desc: For more than 30 years, Donal MacIntyre has worked as a hard-hitting investigative reporter and has risked his life on more than one occasion to shine a light on the darkest corners of the criminal underworld.

programme.title: Murder Wall
programme.desc: In the early hours, police deliver horrible news to parents: their two sons have been attacked in a senseless beating while returning home from a night out.

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: In 2016, car salesman Hufracio Arteaga was found stabbed to death in his Michigan City office, and surveillance cameras from a nearby building could potentially help investigators reveal the killer.

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: In San Antonio, Christopher Duncan leaves his apartment never to return home. Police have little to go on until surveillance footage offers up the possible identity of a dangerous killer.

programme.title: Murder She Solved
programme.desc: The police search frantically when a respected member of the gay community goes missing.

programme.title: Murder She Solved
programme.desc: When a freelance journalist goes missing, a rookie investigator searches for answers.

programme.title: Murder She Solved
programme.desc: Female investigators open up about some of the biggest cases they have cracked, beginning with a decade-long investigation into the death of a young woman.

programme.title: Murder She Solved
programme.desc: When 52-year-old nurse Mindy Schloss vanished from her home, it fell to dedicated detective Pam Perrenoud to bring her cruel killer to justice.

programme.title: A Stranger in My Home
programme.desc: An ex-convict gains full control of a mother.

programme.title: A Stranger in My Home
programme.desc: In Brooklyn, N.Y., a co-op owner, his handyman and a real estate owner fight over money and possible tenants, then one person goes missing while another gets away with murder.

programme.title: A Stranger in My Home
programme.desc: Police find charred human remains in a burn pile at a farmstead while investigating the disappearance of the homeowner and his live-in help.

programme.title: A Stranger in My Home
programme.desc: In Aspen, Colo., socialite Nancy Pfister invites Trey and Nancy Styler to rent out her chalet, but the living arrangement ends in a brutal beating death and accusations of murder.

programme.title: Bomber: Terror of WWII: By Night & By Day
programme.desc: By Night & By Day: The story of a deadly war that intertwines Germany, Poland, Japan, Italy and Spain, and the remorseless development of weapons and bombers.

programme.title: Bomber: Terror of WWII: Terror of The World
programme.desc: Terror of the World: The story of a deadly war that intertwines Germany, Poland, Japan, Italy and Spain, and the remorseless development of weapons and bombers.

programme.title: The Plane That Led D-Day: Part 1
programme.desc: On 5 June 1944, a C-47 paratrooper aircraft nicknamed 'That’s All, Brother' took off from England to drop Allied fighting men into Normandy. But, post-War she disappeared. A chance discovery in 2015 led a scramble to save the aircraft.

programme.title: The Plane That Led D-Day: Part 2
programme.desc: On 5 June 1944, a C-47 paratrooper aircraft nicknamed 'That’s All, Brother' took off from England to drop Allied fighting men into Normandy. But, post-War she disappeared. A chance discovery in 2015 led a scramble to save the aircraft.

programme.title: The Plane That Led D-Day: Part 3
programme.desc: On 5 June 1944, a C-47 paratrooper aircraft nicknamed 'That’s All, Brother' took off from England to drop Allied fighting men into Normandy. But, post-War she disappeared. A chance discovery in 2015 led a scramble to save the aircraft.

programme.title: Memories of D-Day
programme.desc: 6 June 1944: Operation Overlord begins. Discover D-Day through the eyes of the British Soldiers. In this film, photographs collected by four soldiers allow us to better understand the battle that occurred while reconquering occupied territory.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Ranged Weapons
programme.desc: Ranged weapons guarantee a warrior's best chance of survival. International experts survey history’s most important ranged weapons, from the Roman spear and the English longbow, right up to the futuristic railgun.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Attack From Above
programme.desc: Examining how warfare entered a new dimension as attacks from the skies became possible with weapons from incendiary arrows to drones.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Close Combat
programme.desc: Weapons experts test the physical and psychological impact of close combat weapons - the Roman short sword, the medieval war hammer and the bayonet.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Weapons For All
programme.desc: From the crossbow to the Kalashnikov to 3D-printed firearms, weaponry designed for everyone can offer a decisive advantage in warfare.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Faster Than The Enemy
programme.desc: In spectacular experiments, a team of international experts presents the most significant cases in the history of weapons where speed has made a decisive difference.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Power Of Destruction, The
programme.desc: New weapons with devastating force shape the wars of the 20th century. International experts test the catastrophic effects of the three most destructive weapons of our time: the machine gun, hand grenade and tank.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: War At Sea
programme.desc: A look at key maritime weapons such as the secret super-weapon that kept Constantinople safe for centuries, the thunderous force of a ship's cannon, and the deadly torpedo.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: The Ambush
programme.desc: Examining how the techniques of ambush, along with weapons that remained undetected until the very moment they were used, would revolutionise warfare.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Deadly Inventions
programme.desc: Wars become even bloodier as new technologies continue to evolve. An international team of experts tests the deadliest weapons upgrades in the history of warfare.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Civilians On The Battlefield
programme.desc: Experts look at three types of weapon employed to attack civilian populations, from the medieval trebuchet to modern bio-weapons and nuclear bombs.

programme.title: Hitler's Gold: Financing Evil
programme.desc: Munich, 12 September 1919. History is about to be changed by a penniless army corporal thirsty to avenge his adoptive motherland. 13 years later, he will be saluted as the saviour of the German nation. His name is Adolf Hitler.

programme.title: Hitler's Gold: The Nazi Economic Miracle
programme.desc: Germany, 1937. By imposing his national economic policies by brute force, Adolf Hitler appears to be fulfilling his promise of returning Germany to prosperity within four years. But there is an altogether more sinister side to this economic recovery.

programme.title: Hitler's Gold: The Business Of War
programme.desc: With the help of large corporations inside and outside of Germany, Adolf Hitler conquered almost half of Europe in less than four years. Millions would be enslaved for the growth of the Nazi war machine. But in the end, what was it all for?
